testCases.title: Verify header and subheader texts are displayed correctly
steps: Verification: Expect locator `page.locator('#preheader')` to have text 'A course to help you'
Verification: Expect locator `page.locator('#header')` to have text 'SCRAPE ANY WEBSITE'
Verification: Expect locator `page.locator('#postheader')` to have text 'Learn how to build your own web scrapers and\nstart collecting the data you need.'
expected: Header and subheader texts are displayed as expected.

testCases.title: Verify 'Get Started Now' link navigates to the correct URL
expected: Navigates to the correct Gumroad purchase page
